name: Hackathon Setup Guide
description: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, including signing up for the service, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model for your use case.
context: unlimited access to thousands of open-source AI models

name: API Usage
description: The guide explains how to make API calls using Python Requests and OpenAI SDK, including examples for chat completions and model selection.

name: Troubleshooting
description: Common errors and their solutions are provided, including 401 and 403 errors, and issues with model concurrency.

name: Concurrency Limits
description: Details on how Featherless.ai manages concurrency and the costs associated with different model sizes and tiers.

name: Application Guides
description: Detailed guides are available to help integrate Featherless.ai into existing projects and workflows.
